name: Peanut Butter Amaranth Logs
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together amaranth and coconut.
2. Place the mixture on a cookie sheet in the oven for 15 minutes at 300°F.
3. While the mixture is toasting, place the remaining ingredients (peanut butter, tahini, honey, wheat bran, sunflower seeds, milk powder) in a medium bowl and mix thoroughly.
4. Divide the toasted amaranth and coconut mixture into two parts.
5. Mix half of the toasted mixture with the blended ingredients from step 3.
6. Roll the combined mixture into one dozen logs, each measuring three inches by half an inch.
7. Coat the outside of the logs with the remaining toasted amaranth and coconut mixture.
8. Place the logs in the refrigerator or freezer until ready to serve.
Suggestion: Fine coconut will give better results.
